name: Dependency Risk Radar
persona: A PM or tech lead at a 50–500 person B2B SaaS company doing dependency due diligence before a major upgrade or vendor switch without dedicated AppSec support
problem_statement: When planning an upgrade, teams waste days triangulating dependency health and security across sites and still lack a prioritized, evidence-backed triage list for what to upgrade, replace, or investigate first
artifact_type: two-mode paste-and-triage web app with a sortable risk table and per-dependency evidence drawer
